'''ngahata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crachach|crachach]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-h-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crachach|crachach]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngahata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæhætæth|ngæhætæth]] || [[word:ngæhætæj|ngæhætæj]] || [[word:ngæhætæsh|ngæhætæsh]] || [[word:ngæhætæ|ngæhætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngahahatath|ngahahatath]] || [[word:ngahahataj|ngahahataj]] || [[word:ngahahatash|ngahahatash]] || [[word:ngahahata|ngahahata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngahatath|ngahatath]] || [[word:ngahataj|ngahataj]] || [[word:ngahatash|ngahatash]] || [[word:ngahata|ngahata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngahaftath|ngahaftath]] || [[word:ngahaftaj|ngahaftaj]] || [[word:ngahaftash|ngahaftash]] || [[word:ngahaftaf|ngahaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngahatatha|ngahatatha]] || [[word:ngahataja|ngahataja]] || [[word:ngahatasha|ngahatasha]] || [[word:ngahataka|ngahataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngahatath|ngahatath]] || [[word:ngahataj|ngahataj]] || [[word:ngahatash|ngahatash]] || [[word:ngahata|ngahata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngahatathal|ngahatathal]] || [[word:ngahatajal|ngahatajal]] || [[word:ngahatashal|ngahatashal]] || [[word:ngahatakal|ngahatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngahatathatha|ngahatathatha]] || [[word:ngahatajaja|ngahatajaja]] || [[word:ngahatashasha|ngahatashasha]] || [[word:ngahataka|ngahataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngahatathan|ngahatathan]] || [[word:ngahatajan|ngahatajan]] || [[word:ngahatashan|ngahatashan]] || [[word:ngahatakan|ngahatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngahatathaoro|ngahatathaoro]] || [[word:ngahatajaoro|ngahatajaoro]] || [[word:ngahatashaoro|ngahatashaoro]] || [[word:ngahatakaoro|ngahatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
